title: The Chartered Institute of Logistics and Transport (Amendment) Act, 2021

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Zambia Chartered Institute of Short title
sections.body:
Logistics and Transport (Amendment) Act, 2021, and shall be read
as one with the Zambia Chartered Institute of Logistics and Act No. 4 of
Transport Act, 2014, in this Act referred to as the principal Act. 2014
2. Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the insertion of Amendment
the following new definitions in the appropriate places in alphabetical of
section 2
order:
“ Higher Education Authority” means the Higher Education
Authority established under the Higher Education Act, Act No. 4 of
2013;; and 2013
“Zambia Qualifications Authority” means the Zambia
Qualifications Authority established under the Zambia Act No. 13 of
Qualifications Authority Act, 2011. 2011
3. Section 7 (2) of the principal Act is amended by the— Amendment
of
(a) deletion of paragraph (d); and section 7
(b) renumbering of paragraphs (e),(f), (g), (h), (i) and (j) as
paragraphs (d), (e),(f),(g),(h) and (i), respectively.
4. Section 24 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment
of paragraph (b) and the substitution therefor of the following: of
section 24
(b) has attended a university, college or school registered by
the Higher Education Authority and holds a degree or
other qualification for this class of membership
accredited and recognised by the Zambia Qualifications
Authority;.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
